prompt:
Analyzes a given DataFrame containing article titles and content to identify articles with titles that include the words "how" or "what". It calculates the TF-IDF scores for the words in the content of these articles and visualizes these scores in a bar plot. Note that: If the DataFrame does not contain 'Title' and 'Content' columns, the function returns an empty plot. If no articles have titles containing "how" or "what," the function also returns an empty plot. Set the name of the y-axis to 'TF-IDF Score'. Set xticks to display the feature names vertically. The function should output with: tuple(ax: matplotlib.axes.Axes, empty_plot: bool) ax: A matplotlib Axes object displaying a bar plot of the TF-IDF scores. empty_plot: A boolean indicating if the plotted result is an empty plot (True) or contains data (False). ```
